title: Elden Ring Weapon Pack
description: A mod that adds custom weapons from elden ring utilizing default vanilla textures
body:
This is a simple mod that adds over 25+ different weapons into the Minecraft all from Elden Ring. As of currently this is a very basic version of the mod with only the weapons and their damage values and recipes. 

In the future I will be adding abilities to certain weapons along with compatibility to other mods such as Better Combat.
